title: Learn to Ask Questions — Level 1
tagline: Real-life situations that turn natural curiosity into meaningful questions.
description: Children observe familiar scenes, think about what is happening and practise forming clear questions. The self-checking flip-and-check design helps them explore possible answers while building communication and social understanding.
benefits: Helps children ask better and more relevant questions
Builds curiosity, observation and early critical thinking
Encourages confident communication, empathy and good manners

comparison.format: Double-sided laminated cards with rounded corners

themesIncluded: Friendship, family, school, feelings, manners, safety, curiosity and everyday life skills.
